description: Minute fragment of a legal document. Same hand as the unusual Palestinian ketubba T-S 8.129; the Khalaf ha-Kohen ha-Gizbar mentioned here may be identical with the [...] ha-Kohen ha-Gizbar mentioned there. This fragment also mentions [...] b. Mawhūb, Ḥasan, the phrase שלא מוכרחים, and the term לעסק. ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
